Imports

os, tables, sets, times, strutils, reservedmem, dynlib

Types

HcrProcGetter = proc (libHandle: pointer; procName: cstring): pointer {.nimcall.}
  Source   Edit 
HcrModuleInitializer = proc () {.nimcall.}
  Source   Edit
